meta.title: CLARYEL Web Community — Create and manage websites by voice
meta.description: Describe the website you want, attach brand references, publish through GitHub and Cloudflare, then change content, design and functionality with simple voice commands.
beta.label: BETA
beta.platform: Ce site est construit avec CLARYEL Web Community.
beta.notice: Version bêta : certaines fonctions peuvent encore comporter des erreurs.
hero.eyebrow: UNE NOUVELLE FAÇON VOCALE DE CRÉER LE WEB
hero.title: Votre site commence par une conversation.
hero.lead: Décrivez votre activité, montrez un logo ou une référence visuelle et obtenez un site que vous pouvez continuer à améliorer à la voix. Modifiez textes, mise en page, couleurs, fonctions et détails sans apprendre un éditeur.
hero.caption: Fonctionne avec ChatGPT ou une autre IA connectée à GitHub. Aucune clé API IA n’est requise pour la bêta Community.
demo.command: Make the homepage calmer. Use more white space, move booking above the fold and make the mobile menu easier to use.
demo.answer: I’ll update the layout, visual rhythm, call to action and mobile navigation, run the checks and prepare the deployment.
how.title: Expliquez une fois. Continuez à façonner en dialoguant.
how.lead: The same natural-language workflow continues after launch. Your site is not a frozen AI draft.
how.one.title: Tell the story
how.one.text: Speak or type what you offer, who it is for and what the site should achieve.
how.two.title: Show the brand
how.two.text: Attach a logo, photo, sketch or example. The brief keeps the visual direction together.
how.three.title: Publish with confidence
how.three.text: The AI works in GitHub, documents the change, runs checks and deploys through Cloudflare.
how.four.title: Keep talking
how.four.text: Ask for a new page, a different tone, a better mobile layout or a complete redesign.
voice.title: Chaque mise à jour peut commencer par votre voix.
voice.lead: Use everyday language instead of searching through settings. The AI translates intent into reviewed website changes.
voice.one: Change text, images and calls to action
voice.two: Add pages, forms and business functionality
voice.three: Improve SEO, accessibility, mobile behaviour and performance
design.title: Dirigez le style. L’IA gère le canevas.
design.lead: Describe a feeling, point to a problem or ask for an expert review. The AI can evaluate hierarchy, spacing, typography, colour, contrast and responsive behaviour before changing the code.
design.command1: Make it feel more premium and less crowded.
design.command2: Keep the brand colours, but improve contrast and typography.
design.command3: Review the mobile version and fix every weak visual detail.
workspace.title: Commencez par raconter votre site.
workspace.lead: Create a local project brief, dictate the first description and prepare it for ChatGPT or another AI connected to GitHub.
workspace.limit: Deux sites actifs par compte gratuit
workspace.name: Project or brand name
workspace.storyPlaceholder: What do you do? Who is the site for? What should visitors understand or do? Describe the style in your own words.
workspace.stylePlaceholder: For example: quiet, premium, editorial, warm, technical, playful or minimalist.
workspace.fileHint: Select a logo or images. The exported brief will remind you to attach the same files to the AI conversation.
workspace.empty: Your first website conversation will appear here.
workspace.voiceUnavailable: Voice input is not available in this browser. You can type the same request.
project.changePlaceholder: For example: make the services section clearer and redesign the mobile cards.
plans.title: Créez deux sites gratuitement. Évoluez quand votre activité grandit.
plans.freeText: Two active websites per account, voice briefs, portable manifests and community support.
plans.creator: Creator
plans.creatorText: Planned: more websites, encrypted backup, richer templates and assisted updates.
plans.studioText: Planned: teams, client workspaces, roles, audit history and higher limits.
plans.account: L’allocation gratuite s’applique au titulaire du compte, particulier ou organisation.
plans.license: Source available under Business Source License 1.1. Use beyond the free account grant requires a commercial licence.
footer.text: Voice-first Community Edition maintained by CLARYEL S.R.L.S.
error.limitBody: The Community plan supports two active websites per account. Delete a project or use a commercial plan for a higher limit.
error.invalidHost: Enter a valid domain such as example.com.
error.invalidProject: The selected file is not a valid CLARYEL Web Community project.
error.delete: Delete this project from this browser?
